lines.gurmukhi: ਸੂਖਮ ਮੂਰਤਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਨਿਰੰਜਨ ਕਾਇਆ ਕਾ ਆਕਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: sookham moorat naam niranjan kaaeaa kaa aakaar |
lines.english: But to the subtle image of the Immaculate Name, they apply the form of a body.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤੀਆ ਮਨਿ ਸੰਤੋਖੁ ਉਪਜੈ ਦੇਣੈ ਕੈ ਵੀਚਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: sateea man santokh upajai denai kai veechaar |
lines.english: In the minds of the virtuous, contentment is produced, thinking about their giving.

lines.gurmukhi: ਚੋਰਾ ਜਾਰਾ ਤੈ ਕੂੜਿਆਰਾ ਖਾਰਾਬਾ ਵੇਕਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: choraa jaaraa tai koorriaaraa khaaraabaa vekaar |
lines.english: The thieves, adulterers, perjurers, evil-doers and sinners

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੇ ਦੇ ਮੰਗਹਿ ਸਹਸਾ ਗੂਣਾ ਸੋਭ ਕਰੇ ਸੰਸਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: de de mangeh sahasaa goonaa sobh kare sansaar |
lines.english: They give and give, but ask a thousand-fold more, and hope that the world will honor them.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਕਿ ਹੋਦਾ ਖਾਇ ਚਲਹਿ ਐਥਾਊ ਤਿਨਾ ਭਿ ਕਾਈ ਕਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: eik hodaa khaae chaleh aithaaoo tinaa bhi kaaee kaar |
lines.english: - after using up what good karma they had, they depart; have they done any good deeds here at all?

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਲਿ ਥਲਿ ਜੀਆ ਪੁਰੀਆ ਲੋਆ ਆਕਾਰਾ ਆਕਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: jal thal jeea pureea loaa aakaaraa aakaar |
lines.english: There are beings and creatures in the water and on the land, in the worlds and universes, form upon form.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਭਗਤਾ ਭੁਖ ਸਾਲਾਹਣੁ ਸਚੁ ਨਾਮੁ ਆਧਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: naanak bhagataa bhukh saalaahan sach naam aadhaar |
lines.english: O Nanak, the hunger of the devotees is to praise You; the True Name is their only support.

lines.gurmukhi: ਓਇ ਜਿ ਆਖਹਿ ਸੁ ਤੂੰਹੈ ਜਾਣਹਿ ਤਿਨਾ ਭਿ ਤੇਰੀ ਸਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: oe ji aakheh su toonhai jaaneh tinaa bhi teree saar |
lines.english: Whatever they say, You know; You care for them all.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਿਟੀ ਮੁਸਲਮਾਨ ਕੀ ਪੇੜੈ ਪਈ ਕੁਮੑਿਆਰ ॥
lines.translit: mittee musalamaan kee perrai pee kumaiaar |
lines.english: The clay of the Muslim's grave becomes clay for the potter's wheel.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਦਾ ਅਨੰਦਿ ਰਹਹਿ ਦਿਨੁ ਰਾਤੀ ਗੁਣਵੰਤਿਆ ਪਾ ਛਾਰੁ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: sadaa anand raheh din raatee gunavantiaa paa chhaar |1|
lines.english: They live in eternal bliss, day and night; they are the dust of the feet of the virtuous. ||1||

lines.translit: mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਘੜਿ ਭਾਂਡੇ ਇਟਾ ਕੀਆ ਜਲਦੀ ਕਰੇ ਪੁਕਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: gharr bhaandde ittaa keea jaladee kare pukaar |
lines.english: Pots and bricks are fashioned from it, and it cries out as it burns.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਲਿ ਜਲਿ ਰੋਵੈ ਬਪੁੜੀ ਝੜਿ ਝੜਿ ਪਵਹਿ ਅੰਗਿਆਰ ॥
lines.translit: jal jal rovai bapurree jharr jharr paveh angiaar |
lines.english: The poor clay burns, burns and weeps, as the fiery coals fall upon it.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਜਿਨਿ ਕਰਤੈ ਕਾਰਣੁ ਕੀਆ ਸੋ ਜਾਣੈ ਕਰਤਾਰੁ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: naanak jin karatai kaaran keea so jaanai karataar |2|
lines.english: O Nanak, the Creator created the creation; the Creator Lord alone knows. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਕਿਨੈ ਨ ਪਾਇਓ ਬਿਨੁ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਕਿਨੈ ਨ ਪਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: bin satigur kinai na paaeo bin satigur kinai na paaeaa |
lines.english: Without the True Guru, no one has obtained the Lord; without the True Guru, no one has obtained the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਮਿਲਿਐ ਸਦਾ ਮੁਕਤੁ ਹੈ ਜਿਨਿ ਵਿਚਹੁ ਮੋਹੁ ਚੁਕਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: satigur miliai sadaa mukat hai jin vichahu mohu chukaaeaa |
lines.english: Meeting the True Guru, eternal liberation is obtained; He has banished attachment from within.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਵਿਚਿ ਆਪੁ ਰਖਿਓਨੁ ਕਰਿ ਪਰਗਟੁ ਆਖਿ ਸੁਣਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: satigur vich aap rakhion kar paragatt aakh sunaaeaa |
lines.english: He has placed Himself within the True Guru; revealing Himself, He declares this openly.

lines.gurmukhi: ਉਤਮੁ ਏਹੁ ਬੀਚਾਰੁ ਹੈ ਜਿਨਿ ਸਚੇ ਸਿਉ ਚਿਤੁ ਲਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: autam ehu beechaar hai jin sache siau chit laaeaa |
lines.english: This is the highest thought, that one's consciousness is attached to the True Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉ ਵਿਚਿ ਜੰਮਿਆ ਹਉ ਵਿਚਿ ਮੁਆ ॥
lines.translit: hau vich jamiaa hau vich muaa |
lines.english: In ego they are born, and in ego they die.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਗਜੀਵਨੁ ਦਾਤਾ ਪਾਇਆ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: jagajeevan daataa paaeaa |6|
lines.english: Thus the Lord of the World, the Great Giver is obtained. ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉ ਵਿਚਿ ਆਇਆ ਹਉ ਵਿਚਿ ਗਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: hau vich aaeaa hau vich geaa |
lines.english: In ego they come, and in ego they go.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕ ਮਃ ੧ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: Salok, First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉ ਵਿਚਿ ਖਟਿਆ ਹਉ ਵਿਚਿ ਗਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: hau vich khattiaa hau vich geaa |
lines.english: In ego they earn, and in ego they lose.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉ ਵਿਚਿ ਦਿਤਾ ਹਉ ਵਿਚਿ ਲਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: hau vich ditaa hau vich leaa |
lines.english: In ego they give, and in ego they take.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉ ਵਿਚਿ ਪਾਪ ਪੁੰਨ ਵੀਚਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: hau vich paap pun veechaar |
lines.english: In ego they reflect on virtue and sin.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉ ਵਿਚਿ ਹਸੈ ਹਉ ਵਿਚਿ ਰੋਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: hau vich hasai hau vich rovai |
lines.english: In ego they laugh, and in ego they weep.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉ ਵਿਚਿ ਸਚਿਆਰੁ ਕੂੜਿਆਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: hau vich sachiaar koorriaar |
lines.english: In ego they become truthful or false.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉ ਵਿਚਿ ਨਰਕਿ ਸੁਰਗਿ ਅਵਤਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: hau vich narak surag avataar |
lines.english: In ego they go to heaven or hell.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉ ਵਿਚਿ ਜਾਤੀ ਜਿਨਸੀ ਖੋਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: hau vich jaatee jinasee khovai |
lines.english: In ego they lose social status and class.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉ ਵਿਚਿ ਭਰੀਐ ਹਉ ਵਿਚਿ ਧੋਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: hau vich bhareeai hau vich dhovai |
lines.english: In ego they become dirty, and in ego they are washed clean.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉ ਵਿਚਿ ਮੂਰਖੁ ਹਉ ਵਿਚਿ ਸਿਆਣਾ ॥
lines.translit: hau vich moorakh hau vich siaanaa |
lines.english: In ego they are ignorant, and in ego they are wise.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉ ਵਿਚਿ ਮਾਇਆ ਹਉ ਵਿਚਿ ਛਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: hau vich maaeaa hau vich chhaaeaa |
lines.english: In ego they love Maya, and in ego they are kept in darkness by it.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੋਖ ਮੁਕਤਿ ਕੀ ਸਾਰ ਨ ਜਾਣਾ ॥
lines.translit: mokh mukat kee saar na jaanaa |
lines.english: They do not know the value of salvation and liberation.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਹੁਕਮੀ ਲਿਖੀਐ ਲੇਖੁ ॥
lines.translit: naanak hukamee likheeai lekh |
lines.english: O Nanak, by the Lord's Command, destiny is recorded.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉਮੈ ਬੂਝੈ ਤਾ ਦਰੁ ਸੂਝੈ ॥
lines.translit: haumai boojhai taa dar soojhai |
lines.english: When one understands ego, then the Lord's gate is known.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉਮੈ ਕਰਿ ਕਰਿ ਜੰਤ ਉਪਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: haumai kar kar jant upaaeaa |
lines.english: Living in ego, mortal beings are created.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਿਆਨ ਵਿਹੂਣਾ ਕਥਿ ਕਥਿ ਲੂਝੈ ॥
lines.translit: giaan vihoonaa kath kath loojhai |
lines.english: Without spiritual wisdom, they babble and argue.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੇਹਾ ਵੇਖਹਿ ਤੇਹਾ ਵੇਖੁ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: jehaa vekheh tehaa vekh |1|
lines.english: As the Lord sees us, so are we seen. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਹਲਾ ੨ ॥
lines.translit: mahalaa 2 |
lines.english: Second Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉਮੈ ਏਹਾ ਜਾਤਿ ਹੈ ਹਉਮੈ ਕਰਮ ਕਮਾਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: haumai ehaa jaat hai haumai karam kamaeh |
lines.english: This is the nature of ego, that people perform their actions in ego.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉਮੈ ਕਿਥਹੁ ਊਪਜੈ ਕਿਤੁ ਸੰਜਮਿ ਇਹ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: haumai kithahu aoopajai kit sanjam ih jaae |
lines.english: Where does ego come from? How can it be removed?

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉਮੈ ਏਹੋ ਹੁਕਮੁ ਹੈ ਪਇਐ ਕਿਰਤਿ ਫਿਰਾਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: haumai eho hukam hai peiai kirat firaeh |
lines.english: This ego exists by the Lord's Order; people wander according to their past actions.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉਮੈ ਏਈ ਬੰਧਨਾ ਫਿਰਿ ਫਿਰਿ ਜੋਨੀ ਪਾਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: haumai eee bandhanaa fir fir jonee paeh |
lines.english: This is the bondage of ego, that time and time again, they are reborn.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉਮੈ ਦੀਰਘ ਰੋਗੁ ਹੈ ਦਾਰੂ ਭੀ ਇਸੁ ਮਾਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: haumai deeragh rog hai daaroo bhee is maeh |
lines.english: Ego is a chronic disease, but it contains its own cure as well.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਿਰਪਾ ਕਰੇ ਜੇ ਆਪਣੀ ਤਾ ਗੁਰ ਕਾ ਸਬਦੁ ਕਮਾਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: kirapaa kare je aapanee taa gur kaa sabad kamaeh |
lines.english: If the Lord grants His Grace, one acts according to the Teachings of the Guru's Shabad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੇਵ ਕੀਤੀ ਸੰਤੋਖੀਈਁ ਜਿਨੑੀ ਸਚੋ ਸਚੁ ਧਿਆਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: sev keetee santokheeee jinaee sacho sach dhiaaeaa |
lines.english: Those who serve are content. They meditate on the Truest of the True.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕੁ ਕਹੈ ਸੁਣਹੁ ਜਨਹੁ ਇਤੁ ਸੰਜਮਿ ਦੁਖ ਜਾਹਿ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: naanak kahai sunahu janahu it sanjam dukh jaeh |2|
lines.english: Nanak says, listen, people: in this way, troubles depart. ||2||
